proposal_summary: This proposal upgrades the Nouns DAO logic contract to V2, introducing dynamic quorum, voting with gas refunds, multiple bug fixes, and a two-step vetoer change process. It also funds the contract with 12 ETH for the new gas refund feature.

disclosed_entities.name: Nouns DAO logic contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This proposal updates the Nouns DAO logic contract to a new version

disclosed_entities.name: treasury
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: periodic ETH transfer proposals from the treasury to the DAO contract

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Upgrades DAO logic contract to version 2.
Sets minimum quorum to 10%, maximum to 15%, and coefficient to 1.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: _setDynamicQuorumParams: sets dynamic quorum params to: 1. Minimum quorum BPs: 10%... Maximum quorum BPs: 15%... Coefficient: 1

claimed_actions.raw_action: transfer: funding vote refunds with 12 ETH
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Funds the vote gas refund mechanism with 12 ETH.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: transfer: funding vote refunds with 12 ETH, which should be enough for just over 100 proposals at today's participation rate

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal involves an implementation logic upgrade, introducing new parameters (dynamic quorum), and transferring funds for a new gas refund mechanism.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal updates the Nouns DAO logic contract to a new version, with the following improvements and additions: 1. Dynamic Quorum... 2. Vote with Gas Refund...

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: transfer: funding vote refunds with 12 ETH

limitations: No target contract addresses are explicitly provided in the proposal text, other than an address embedded within an informational mirror.xyz URL.
